name: @openbis-platform/lit-scan
description: Runtime performance scanner for Lit Web Components, inspired by React Scan

scripts.build: tsc && npx esbuild dist/extension/panel.js --bundle --outfile=dist/extension/panel.js --allow-overwrite && npx esbuild dist/extension/devtools.js --bundle --outfile=dist/extension/devtools.js --allow-overwrite && npx esbuild dist/extension/background.js --bundle --outfile=dist/extension/background.js --allow-overwrite && npx esbuild dist/extension/content-script.js --bundle --outfile=dist/extension/content-script.js --allow-overwrite && cp src/extension/*.html dist/extension/ && cp src/extension/manifest.json dist/extension/
